title: 1966 and All That
summary: The one time it actually came home. The story of Alf Ramsey's Wingless Wonders, Bobby Moore's captaincy, and Geoff Hurst's still-debated hat-trick — the single result every England conversation eventually returns to.

title: Agony and Ecstasy: The Southgate Era
summary: No England manager since Ramsey took the team this far, this often. A World Cup semi-final and two European Championship finals — and still no trophy. The story of a manager whose own playing career began with the exact same heartbreak he spent eight years trying to end.

title: Road to New Jersey
summary: Thomas Tuchel's first tournament, and Jude Bellingham's coming of age. Follow England's run through Group L, a scare against DR Congo, an instant classic in Mexico City, and extra time against Norway — with the semi-final against Argentina still to come.

title: The Long Wait
summary: Sixty years and counting. A short guide to every near-miss between English football's only triumph and its ongoing pursuit of a second — Turin 1990, Wembley 1996, Moscow 2018, Wembley 2021, Al Khor 2022, Berlin 2024.
